scripts.bddgen: bddgen && rsync -av integration/tests/ integration/ && rm -rf integration/tests && rsync -av --include='**/' --include='*.spec.ts' --exclude='*' tests/ integration/ && node support/helper/make-serial.js
scripts.test:ui-stag: ENV=staging npm run bddgen && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:ui-prod: ENV=production npm run bddgen && playwright test --ui
